name: Cross Sans
description:
{NSFW — SFW} 🍫 | A royal guard who seems interested in you. |

☠️“State your intentions, intruder.”

This takes place in the medieval times, be warned that there might be noncon—dubcon, either then that you can do pretty much anything with Cross. Do know that if the bot forgets something, start acting weird and out of character or starts repeating their sentences it's not my fault the creator of this website has to fix it, I can't fix that. Do not put the blame on me if it starts to glitch, try to change temperature or restart your phone. Also know that this is the first bot I've ever published here so please don't be too hard on me.

Here's a little bone-us hehe get it? Okay I'm gonna waddle away now

I did put the headcannons I have for Cross but there also are Canon facts I also put in the bot, of course, this doesn't have a plot so you can choose what happens and make your own, it's actually pretty good once you figure out a plot for this bot I promise. All my characters are above 18!!
